title: meibomia supina
intro: Meibomia supina, also known as butterfly milkweed, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Meibomia supina include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Meibomia supina can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
